title: Zebra Technologies is One of America's Greatest Workplaces for Diversity
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), an innovator at the front line of business with solutions and partners that deliver a performance edge, today announced it has been named to Newsweek's inaugural list of America's Greatest Workplaces for Diversity. Zebra's five-star rating was based on the results of a large-scale independent survey conducted by Newsweek and market data research firm, Plant-A Insights Group.

title: Zebra Technologies: Time To Prove Itself
text: Zebra has been hit hard by component shortages, a strong dollar and softer order growth by its customers. Amidst sales coming to a standstill in 2022, margins have held up quite well.

title: Zebra Technologies Launches Advanced Tier Machine Vision Specialization for Partners
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), an innovator at the front line of business with solutions and partners that deliver a performance edge, today announced it has launched a new Advanced Tier of its Machine Vision Specialization program for industrial automation and machine vision specialization partners globally.

title: Zebra Technologies: Still A Buy Under A New CEO
text: Zebra Technologies' CEO steps down and moves to the Chairman of the Board. The current Chief Product & Solutions Officer will become the new CEO in March.

title: Zebra Technologies Introduces “The Modern Store by Zebra” to Help Retailers Solve Ongoing Store Challenges
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), an innovator at the front line of business with solutions and partners that deliver a performance edge, today introduced The Modern Store by Zebra, its visionary framework designed to help retailers solve the most pressing challenges they face in operating their stores. Backed by comprehensive services and a global partner ecosystem, The Modern Store by Zebra empowers retailers to better engage associates, optimize inventory and elevate the customer experience. The Modern Store by Zebra and supporting solutions will be showcased in Booth #3403 at the National Retail Federation (NRF) Annual Convention & EXPO Jan. 15-17, 2023 at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center in New York City.

title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Down 49% in a Year: What's Ailing It?
text: Persistent supply-chain disruptions, foreign currency headwinds and a weak demand environment are weighing on Zebra Technologies' (ZBRA) operations.
